# Simple API List App

A simple Android application that fetches posts from a public API and displays them in a clean list UI.

## Features
- Displays a list of items
- Fetches data from public API
- Clean and user-friendly UI
- Android Java source code

## API Used
https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts

## Tech Stack
- Java
- Android XML
- ListView
- Public REST API

## Folder Structure
app/src/main/java/com/example/simpleapilistapp/MainActivity.java
app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml
app/src/main/res/layout/item_post.xml
